name: todo-list
keyFeature: Add, complete, and delete tasks with local persistence.
description: A highly interactive, fluid task management application featuring category filtering, statistics, and dark mode support. Persists data locally so you never lose your progress.
learnings: Mastered React functional components and hooks (useState, useEffect).
Implemented state persistence using the browser's LocalStorage API.
Created a robust CSS variables system for light/dark mode toggling.

name: CalcuFrost
keyFeature: Basic arithmetic operations with memory history stack.
description: A sleek, neumorphic calculator supporting keyboard inputs, backspacing, chaining calculations, and a slide-out drawer containing your calculation history.
learnings: Built structured JS event listeners to handle mouse and keyboard inputs.
Implemented parsing expressions safely without using eval() to prevent security issues.
Learned neumorphic styling techniques (soft shadows, light source alignment).

name: weather-app
keyFeature: Real-time weather search with detailed climate data.
description: A beautiful weather dashboard displaying current temperatures, humidity, wind speeds, and visual indicators corresponding to weather conditions.
learnings: Learned Vue 3 Composition API basics and reactive binding syntax.
Integrated third-party RESTful APIs (OpenWeatherMap) using fetch.
Implemented dynamic CSS bindings to shift background images based on target temperature.

name: Countdown-timer
keyFeature: Pomodoro-style timer with audio warnings and intervals.
description: A customizable timer designed for productivity. Features play, pause, and reset controls with dynamic circular progress indicators and alert sounds.
learnings: Managed precision timings in JS using setInterval and requestAnimationFrame.
Manipulated SVG stroke-dashoffset dynamically to create a smooth circular progress indicator.
Implemented browser audio playback using the HTML5 Audio interface.

name: colour-gen
keyFeature: Generate randomized cohesive color schemes and export hex codes.
description: An interactive designer tool that generates beautiful color palettes. Allows locking colors, visualizes contrast ratios, and supports quick hex copying.
learnings: Generated color math values programmatically to ensure color harmony (monochromatic, analogous).
Utilized the Clipboard API to copy values and display immediate visual feedback.
Created dynamic styles by setting CSS variables inline inside React components.

name: MARKDUP
keyFeature: Real-time markdown compilation and structural rendering.
description: A split-pane editor allowing users to write standard markdown on the left and see compiled, styled HTML structure rendered live on the right.
learnings: Integrated Marked.js for fast, safe markdown processing.
Created a synchronized split-pane scroll system utilizing Vue refs.
Applied DOM sanitization (DOMPurify) to prevent cross-site scripting (XSS) in custom markdown inputs.

name: trimly
keyFeature: Generate and redirect short links with custom aliases.
description: A backend service exposing REST endpoints to compress long URLs, record redirection click analytics, and support custom back-half naming.
learnings: Built backend routing and controllers using Express.js middleware.
Created Mongoose schemas and queries to index database records efficiently.
Validated input parameters (valid URLs, duplicate aliases) on the server.

name: AuraQuotes
keyFeature: Retrieve quotes with author information and share instantly.
description: A card dashboard that fetches random inspirational quotes from a public API, displays typewriter animations, and facilitates instant sharing via Twitter.
learnings: Handled asynchronous fetch requests, loading states, and error handling in React.
Implemented CSS transition states and keyframes to handle text replacements gracefully.
Constructed URL query strings to connect quote details with third-party social share interfaces.

name: Canvas-studio
keyFeature: Sketching board with stroke width controls, colors, and image export.
description: A responsive drawing workspace utilizing the HTML5 Canvas API. Features smooth quadratic bezier curves for brush lines, brush presets, and png export.
learnings: Utilized Canvas 2D Context properties (lineJoin, lineCap, beginPath, stroke) for rendering.
Developed canvas coordinates scaling logic to ensure high-DPI retina display responsiveness.
Implemented image downloads directly from base64 Canvas data URIs.

name: FortifyGen
keyFeature: Generate strong, randomized passwords with specific constraints.
description: A secure utility that builds custom passwords using checkboxes for uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special symbols, showing an immediate strength score.
learnings: Designed cryptographic-strength random number selectors utilizing window.crypto.getRandomValues.
Constructed custom password strength metrics based on entropy and dictionary patterns.
Used Vue dynamic computed properties to update security indicators and warnings.

name: VibeStream
keyFeature: Search songs, manage playlist tracks, and sync directly.
description: A Spotify-linked dashboard that logs users in via OAuth, enables catalog queries, allows customizing track queues, and saves compiled playlists back to user accounts.
learnings: Completed OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code flow with PKCE on client application.
Handled paginated list queries and headers for the Spotify Web API.
Designed modular card grids for track search results and playlist builder lists.

name: nvidia-nim-chatbot
keyFeature: Mock chatbot interface with fluid typing animations and states.
description: A beautiful chat client UI. Demonstrates state-driven animations, message bubble styles, auto-scrolling lists, and mock automated replies.
learnings: Designed dynamic message bubble layouts that support text, links, and quick reply buttons.
Implemented auto-scroll-to-bottom effects utilizing React useRef and scrollIntoView.
Created realistic typing-indicator bubble animations using CSS stagger delays.

name: AuraJournal
keyFeature: Write entries, tag categories, and save offline in the browser.
description: A minimalist offline journaling workspace. Allows sorting text logs by dates, inserting rich text snippets, and storing all records in the browser's database.
learnings: Acquired fundamental knowledge of Svelte reactivity systems and event dispatching.
Configured client database queries and transactions utilizing IndexedDB (Dexie.js).
Created CSS glassmorphism sidebars and calendar cards for fast entry retrieval.

name: AetherNotes
keyFeature: Real-time sync, collaborative editing, and user authentication.
description: A full-fledged collaborative note-taking application. Features personal accounts, real-time database syncing, tag organization, and instant editing overlays.
learnings: Integrated Firebase Client SDK to handle user signups, logins, and session states.
Utilized Cloud Firestore's snapshot listener (onSnapshot) to sync edits across sessions.
Structured granular database security rules to shield data from unauthorized access.

name: Gitfinderpro
keyFeature: Search accounts, compile repositories, and compute profile stats.
description: A comprehensive search directory. Aggregates GitHub profiles, showcases star counts, lists top languages, and displays repository statistics.
learnings: Managed REST call rate limits by routing requests through a custom Node.js proxy server.
Structured async helper libraries to fetch and stitch profile details, repos, and language data.
Built clean, informative UI cards using flexbox alignments and status icons.

name: CINIVERSE
keyFeature: Search detailed movie information, user ratings, and details.
description: An entertainment catalog searching the The Movie Database (TMDB). Features infinite scroll pagination, movie modal overlays, and watchlists.
learnings: Implemented search query debouncing to reduce redundant API queries.
Created an infinite scrolling observer wrapper using the Intersection Observer API.
Organized movie details (posters, backdrops, ratings, trailers) in visual grids.

name: KAIZENDESK
keyFeature: Product catalog, shopping cart modifiers, and checkout flows.
description: An interactive e-commerce cart. Features product listings, catalog filters, persistent shopping carts, coupon calculations, and checkout processes.
learnings: Mastered central state management in Vue using Pinia/Vuex to avoid prop drilling.
Implemented robust item counts adjustments, subtotal formulas, and taxes computations.
Designed dynamic transitions for sliding elements in the checkout drawer.

name: AuraReads
keyFeature: Curated database of books with genres search and filters.
description: A database system listing literary works. Allows searching catalog titles, filtering by genres, showing user ratings, and leaving comments.
learnings: Built backend routing and HTML template parsing using Python Flask.
Designed SQLite database tables, foreign keys relations, and standard SQL queries.
Integrated backend search routes with visual results layouts.

name: BiteDash
keyFeature: Browse restaurants, customize orders, and inspect deliveries.
description: A premium prototype UI containing restaurant menus, filtering by cuisines, dish customization overlays, and an animated delivery tracker dashboard.
learnings: Created deep complex forms for configuring dish options (extra toppings, sizes).
Designed highly responsive card layouts that resize cleanly across mobile, tablets, and desktop.
Built CSS SVG micro-animations showing delivery status routes in real time.

name: RECONX
keyFeature: Real-time stock data dashboard with visual chart tools.
description: A financial tracking app. Searches company tickers, collects historical trends data, and draws line charts plotting prices over time.
learnings: Parsed complex, time-series financial databases into clean datasets for UI charting.
Configured backend caching using memory tables to prevent exceeding public API key limits.
Designed interactive charts displaying hovering crosshairs and details.

name: DigitPredictionUsingPython
keyFeature: Draw single digits on a canvas and run predictions using ML models.
description: An interactive machine learning app. Captures hand-drawn coordinates, processes image bitmaps, and uses a pre-trained CNN model to predict the digit.
learnings: Configured pre-processing utilities to downsample, crop, and normalize canvas bitmap arrays.
Integrated pre-trained TensorFlow/Keras deep learning models within Python Flask.
Mapped prediction probability matrices to visual confidence bars in the client UI.

name: ChatHaven
keyFeature: WebSockets multi-room chat, member logs, and typing signs.
description: A lightning-fast real-time messaging hub. Features separate chatrooms, auto-generated avatars, active user listings, and real-time typing indicators.
learnings: Configured event handling and client-server synchronization using Socket.io.
Managed active server connections, room allocations, and disconnect events in Node.js.
Engineered instant message pushes to active windows without any UI lag.

name: Aisummerygeneration
keyFeature: Paste text summaries, filter, and extract core arguments.
description: A natural language summarizer tool. Leverages pre-trained transformer pipelines to parse, extract, and compile summaries from lengthy inputs.
learnings: Integrated Hugging Face Inference APIs to run remote transformer computations.
Handled long-running API tasks by integrating client loading states and alerts.
Optimized text sanitization libraries to remove extra whitespace and characters.

name: AtherBoard
keyFeature: Trello-like board with custom lists, cards ordering, and edits.
description: A professional task management workspace. Features drag-and-drop tasks, custom column configurations, tag labels, and drag-and-drop animations.
learnings: Mastered the native HTML5 Drag and Drop API event hooks (dragStart, dragOver, drop).
Re-ordered state arrays immutably inside complex nested React objects.
Designed dynamic columns layouts that adjust spacing to container dimensions.

name: music-visualizer
keyFeature: Plot frequency analysis to 3D particle meshes in real time.
description: A stunning interactive 3D audio-responsive canvas. Analyzes audio frequencies and maps energy bands to manipulate 3D shapes and particles.
learnings: Configured Web Audio API nodes (AudioContext, AnalyserNode) to read raw buffer data.
Created 3D renders, vertex shaders, and animation loops using Three.js.
Mapped decibel levels to animate camera movements and coordinate scales.

name: DevSnippet
keyFeature: Save code snippet lists, filter by programming languages, and highlights.
description: A library for developers. Supports saving snippet code, categorization by syntax languages, full text search, and syntax highlighting.
learnings: Integrated PrismJS/Highlight.js code compilers into React render trees.
Implemented indexing database regex queries to search within lines of code.
Engineered instant copy-code layouts and success confirmation overlays.

name: Sentiment-analysis
keyFeature: Analyze paragraph sentences and classify mood polarity scores.
description: An NLP text dashboard. Inspects input paragraphs and graphs sentiment metrics (positivity, subjectivity, vocabulary usage) using visual dials.
learnings: Configured basic Natural Language Processing classifiers using the TextBlob library.
Built dynamic SVG gauges showing scores moving between negative, neutral, and positive ranges.
Handled long sentences input sanitization and tokenization on the Flask backend.

name: PrimeRealestate
keyFeature: Interactive real estate catalog with search, price filters, and details.
description: A property searching platform. Features detailed filtering (price, beds, location), photo galleries, mock contact agents forms, and listing maps.
learnings: Connected client components with PostgreSQL database queries using node-postgres pg pool.
Constructed complex multi-parameter database queries supporting ranges and regex sorting.
Created sleek, slide-out filters menus and dynamic photo slider components.
